title: eurybia glauca
intro: Eurybia glauca, also known as Blue Eurybia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is primarily found in coastal areas, particularly in the northeastern part of North America. Eurybia glauca has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation.
